project.name: ChatLore Universal (v3)
project.description: Pivot to a Universal AI Context Hub — Any Input (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) to Any Output (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor)

features.name: Multi-Target Output Engine
features.description: Architectural change to support generating specific context files for different AIs from the same analysis.

tasks.title: Create Export Adapters for ChatGPT & Gemini
tasks.description: Create new exporters in `src/lib/exporters/`: `chatgpt-custom-instructions.ts` (strict 1500 char limit optimization) and `gemini-system-instructions.ts`. Update the Results UI to allow switching between 'Export for Claude', 'Export for ChatGPT', and 'Export for Gemini'.

features.name: Claude Input Support
features.description: Allow users to export data FROM Claude and bring it elsewhere.

tasks.title: Build Claude Data Export Parser
tasks.description: Create `src/lib/parsers/claude.ts` to handle Anthropic's data export structure. Update `use-parser.ts` to auto-detect Claude files. This completes the 'Any Input' triad.

features.name: Context Compressor (Smart Summarization)
features.description: ChatGPT has a hard 1500 char limit for Custom Instructions. We need a smart compressor.

tasks.title: Implement Priority-Based Compression
tasks.description: Create a utility that takes the full analysis and 'squeezes' it into 1500 chars for ChatGPT, prioritizing 'Tone' and 'Negative Constraints' while summarizing 'Topics' broadly to save space.

features.name: Universal Branding Overhaul
features.description: Remove 'Claude-centric' language from the entire site.

tasks.title: Update Landing Page & Metadata
tasks.description: Rewrite Hero, Features, and Meta Tags to say 'Sync Any AI Memory' instead of 'Migrate to Claude'. Update the 'OutputPreview' to show tabs for different AIs.
